## Verses (37)

| # | Basic English Bible | Compare |
|---|---|---|
| [1](BBE.md#v1) | And Elihu made answer and said, | [WEB](WEB.md#v1) · [KJV](KJV.md#v1) · [ASV](ASV.md#v1) |
| [2](BBE.md#v2) | Give ear, you wise, to my words; and you who have knowledge, give attention to me; | [WEB](WEB.md#v2) · [KJV](KJV.md#v2) · [ASV](ASV.md#v2) |
| [3](BBE.md#v3) | For words are tested by the ear, as food is tasted by the mouth. | [WEB](WEB.md#v3) · [KJV](KJV.md#v3) · [ASV](ASV.md#v3) |
| [4](BBE.md#v4) | Let us make the decision for ourselves as to what is right; let us have the knowledge among ourselves of what is good. | [WEB](WEB.md#v4) · [KJV](KJV.md#v4) · [ASV](ASV.md#v4) |
| [5](BBE.md#v5) | For Job has said, I am upright, and it is God who has taken away my right; | [WEB](WEB.md#v5) · [KJV](KJV.md#v5) · [ASV](ASV.md#v5) |
| [6](BBE.md#v6) | Though I am right, still I am in pain; my wound may not be made well, though I have done no wrong. | [WEB](WEB.md#v6) · [KJV](KJV.md#v6) · [ASV](ASV.md#v6) |
| [7](BBE.md#v7) | What man is like Job, a man who freely makes sport of God, | [WEB](WEB.md#v7) · [KJV](KJV.md#v7) · [ASV](ASV.md#v7) |
| [8](BBE.md#v8) | And goes in the company of evil-doers, walking in the way of sinners? | [WEB](WEB.md#v8) · [KJV](KJV.md#v8) · [ASV](ASV.md#v8) |
| [9](BBE.md#v9) | For he has said, It is no profit to a man to take delight in God. | [WEB](WEB.md#v9) · [KJV](KJV.md#v9) · [ASV](ASV.md#v9) |
| [10](BBE.md#v10) | Now then, you wise, take note; you men of knowledge, give ear to me. Let it be far from God to do evil, and from the Ruler of all to do wrong. | [WEB](WEB.md#v10) · [KJV](KJV.md#v10) · [ASV](ASV.md#v10) |
| [11](BBE.md#v11) | For he gives to every man the reward of his work, and sees that he gets the fruit of his ways. | [WEB](WEB.md#v11) · [KJV](KJV.md#v11) · [ASV](ASV.md#v11) |
| [12](BBE.md#v12) | Truly, God does not do evil, and the Ruler of all is not a false judge. | [WEB](WEB.md#v12) · [KJV](KJV.md#v12) · [ASV](ASV.md#v12) |
| [13](BBE.md#v13) | Who put the earth into his care, or made him responsible for the world? | [WEB](WEB.md#v13) · [KJV](KJV.md#v13) · [ASV](ASV.md#v13) |
| [14](BBE.md#v14) | If he made his spirit come back to him, taking his breath into himself again, | [WEB](WEB.md#v14) · [KJV](KJV.md#v14) · [ASV](ASV.md#v14) |
| [15](BBE.md#v15) | All flesh would come to an end together, and man would go back to the dust. | [WEB](WEB.md#v15) · [KJV](KJV.md#v15) · [ASV](ASV.md#v15) |
| [16](BBE.md#v16) | If you are wise, take note of this; give ear to the voice of my words. | [WEB](WEB.md#v16) · [KJV](KJV.md#v16) · [ASV](ASV.md#v16) |
| [17](BBE.md#v17) | How may a hater of right be a ruler? and will you say that the upright Ruler of all is evil? | [WEB](WEB.md#v17) · [KJV](KJV.md#v17) · [ASV](ASV.md#v17) |
| [18](BBE.md#v18) | He who says to a king, You are an evil-doer; and to rulers, You are sinners; | [WEB](WEB.md#v18) · [KJV](KJV.md#v18) · [ASV](ASV.md#v18) |
| [19](BBE.md#v19) | Who has no respect for rulers, and who gives no more attention to those who have wealth than to the poor, for they are all the work of his hands. | [WEB](WEB.md#v19) · [KJV](KJV.md#v19) · [ASV](ASV.md#v19) |
| [20](BBE.md#v20) | Suddenly they come to an end, even in the middle of the night: the blow comes on the men of wealth, and they are gone, and the strong are taken away without the hand of man. | [WEB](WEB.md#v20) · [KJV](KJV.md#v20) · [ASV](ASV.md#v20) |
| [21](BBE.md#v21) | For his eyes are on the ways of a man, and he sees all his steps. | [WEB](WEB.md#v21) · [KJV](KJV.md#v21) · [ASV](ASV.md#v21) |
| [22](BBE.md#v22) | There is no dark place, and no thick cloud, in which the workers of evil may take cover. | [WEB](WEB.md#v22) · [KJV](KJV.md#v22) · [ASV](ASV.md#v22) |
| [23](BBE.md#v23) | For he does not give man a fixed time to come before him to be judged. | [WEB](WEB.md#v23) · [KJV](KJV.md#v23) · [ASV](ASV.md#v23) |
| [24](BBE.md#v24) | He sends the strong to destruction without searching out their cause, and puts others in their place. | [WEB](WEB.md#v24) · [KJV](KJV.md#v24) · [ASV](ASV.md#v24) |
| [25](BBE.md#v25) | For he has knowledge of their works, overturning them in the night, so that they are crushed. | [WEB](WEB.md#v25) · [KJV](KJV.md#v25) · [ASV](ASV.md#v25) |
| [26](BBE.md#v26) | The evil-doers are broken by his wrath, he puts his hand on them with force before the eyes of all onlookers. | [WEB](WEB.md#v26) · [KJV](KJV.md#v26) · [ASV](ASV.md#v26) |
| [27](BBE.md#v27) | Because they did not go after him, and took no note of his ways, | [WEB](WEB.md#v27) · [KJV](KJV.md#v27) · [ASV](ASV.md#v27) |
| [28](BBE.md#v28) | So that the cry of the poor might come up to him, and the prayer of those in need come to his ears. | [WEB](WEB.md#v28) · [KJV](KJV.md#v28) · [ASV](ASV.md#v28) |
| [29](BBE.md#v29) | ... | [WEB](WEB.md#v29) · [KJV](KJV.md#v29) · [ASV](ASV.md#v29) |

| [34](BBE.md#v34) | Men of knowledge, and all wise men, hearing me, will say, | [WEB](WEB.md#v34) · [KJV](KJV.md#v34) · [ASV](ASV.md#v34) |
| [35](BBE.md#v35) | Job's words do not come from knowledge; they are not the fruit of wisdom. | [WEB](WEB.md#v35) · [KJV](KJV.md#v35) · [ASV](ASV.md#v35) |
| [36](BBE.md#v36) | May Job be tested to the end, because his answers have been like those of evil men. | [WEB](WEB.md#v36) · [KJV](KJV.md#v36) · [ASV](ASV.md#v36) |
| [37](BBE.md#v37) | For in addition to his sin, he is uncontrolled in heart; before our eyes he makes sport of God, increasing his words against him. | [WEB](WEB.md#v37) · [KJV](KJV.md#v37) · [ASV](ASV.md#v37) |
